summary: Updated the EditorConfig GitHub Actions workflow so files under extern/ are excluded from the changed-files list checked by editorconfig. The same regex edit also removed the grouped tools/(m2c|calcprogress) exclusion and now excludes only tools/calcprogress, based on the diff evidence. No PR body or review discussion was present in the slice.
what_changed: Changed the grep exclusion regex in .github/workflows/editorconfig.yml used after fetching PR changed files via gh api and jq.
Added extern/ to the set of paths ignored by the EditorConfig check.
Changed the tools exclusion from tools/(m2c|calcprogress) to tools/calcprogress, meaning tools/m2c is no longer explicitly excluded by this regex in the shown diff.
The workflow still ignores dump/, build/, expected/, and tools/calcprogress/ paths when constructing $HOME/changed_files.
smart_moves: Kept the fix localized to the workflow path-filtering regex instead of broadening EditorConfig rules globally.
Excluded generated or third-party-style extern/ content at the CI selection stage, which avoids noisy formatting failures on code that likely should not be normalized by project style tooling.
Preserved the existing removed-file filter and changed-files pipeline, minimizing risk to unrelated CI behavior.
decomp_lessons: For decomp repositories, external/vendor inputs and generated artifacts should often be excluded from style automation so CI focuses on source intended to follow project conventions.
Path filters in CI are part of decomp workflow ergonomics: keeping checks scoped prevents formatting-only churn in imported or non-owned directories.

When adjusting ignore regexes, review adjacent alternatives carefully; here the diff suggests tools/m2c was dropped from the ignore set while adding extern/, but there is no discussion explaining whether that was intentional.
naming_conventions: Workflow file is named .github/workflows/editorconfig.yml, matching its single-purpose EditorConfig CI check.
The changed-files output path is $HOME/changed_files, a simple workflow-local artifact name.
Ignored top-level directories are represented as anchored regex alternatives such as extern, dump, build, expected, and tools/calcprogress.
follow_up_queries: Check whether tools/m2c being removed from the EditorConfig ignore regex was intentional or an incidental cleanup.
Search later PRs touching .github/workflows/editorconfig.yml to see if extern/ or tools/m2c ignore behavior was revised.
Audit extern/ contents to confirm they are vendor/generated files that should remain outside project formatting checks.
